# opnsense_interface_neighbor (Resource)

Manages a static ARP/NDP neighbor on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_address` (String) IP address for the static entry.
- `mac` (String) MAC (ethernet) address.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
